entry.title: Witchery is live for the world

td.div: So version 0.2 beta is now ready for the world at large to have a go. The thread on minecraft forums is also live.
This updates adds a bunch of stuff to make acquiring ingredients a little easier as well as a Witches Hat. For all changes and download links see the Version History.

This version adds support for other mods: Thaumcraft Aspects & Golems, BuildCraft pipes, Not Enough Items recipes for the Oven, Distillery & Kettle, Treecapitator, and more! It also adds Witches and Necromancers Robes to buff brewing, a love potion and circle magic to recover despawned items after death! See the version history for all changes.
Loads of tweaks and fixes and two new plants! See the Version History for all details and download links.
Loads of tweaks and fixes a new plant mob and the Alluring Skull! See the Version History for all details and download links.

This release finally implements the majority of feedback from the Minecraft Forums to date and, barring a few bug fixes that might be necessary, the final beta version... See the Version History for a complete list of changes and download links.
Important: I have changed the entity ID management following user feedback, and unfortunately this will result in Demons, Familiars, Mandrake Mobs and Enchanted Broom entities disappearing after the update. Therefore, before updating, make sure Demons and Familiars are done with and the Enchanted Broom is in your inventory. This unfortunately was the only way to permanently ensure no entity id conflicts with other mods.
Adds Magic Mirrors with a few reflection-based magical tricks.
Adds vampirism for players, winged monkeys and towns. See the version history for all changes.

Adds the ability to mix brews in a witches' cauldron containing one or more from over 100 effects. Also adds earmuffs, player compasses, pitfall blocks and a few other bits and bobs. See the version history for download link and all changes.
Add Werewolves and silver weapons to fight them with. Curse of the Wolf can turn players into werewolves with shapeshifting!

This version adds a touch of the demonic to Witchery. Summon an imp and learn dark magic from it, and maybe become the master of Torment. For all new stuff, tweaks and fixes as well as a download link, see the Version History.

Adds Hobgoblins! Bring them home with a leash, build a village for them, put them to work in the mines, make them worship you for power. Use Owls to deliver items and messages, or aerial bombardment. All changes and download links in the Version History.

This version adds Witch Hunters to hunt down witches who practice black magic. Players can also craft special Witch Hunter gear. Defeating Death can now result in special death gear getting dropped (collect the whole set and become death yourself!). All bug fixes and other changes including the download link can be found in the Version History.

This version adds plenty of new gear for witches including the Bark Belt, Brew Bag and Ruby slippers. It also adds a new variation of the Spirit World, a new curse and forestry rite and the ability to target ritual effects elsewhere. It also fixes fixes and tweaks a fair few things, see the Version History for download link and changes.

This version adds a brazier, used to summon spectral undead, and a Spectral Stone to bind them, or create fetishes with them to place around the overworld and spirit world for interesting effects. Infused Brews and solidifying brews to change landscapes. All features are in the Version History.

Witchery 0.15.0 is released, highlights:
Spirit Dimension - Mirrors the real world, use a Brew of Sleeping to get there. Can be nightmarish or nice. Gear stays with your body in the real world! Use a chest if you are scared
Spirit Portals and Rite of Manifestation - Return from the Spirit World though a Spirit Portal as a Ghost, get into secret places unnoticed (remember almost no objects can travel between worlds).
Dream Weaver overhaul - Need string made using the Spinning Wheel with ingredients from the Spirit World.
Dream Weaver of Intensity - Makes Dream Weaver effects stronger (some have less duration then though).
Biting Belt - Something for the leg slot works the same way as Parasytic lice (free potion injection when hit).
Brew of Sleeping - see above.
Brew of Flowing Spirit - Helpful with Spirit World
Brew of Wasting - instant defoliation (or starvation).
Spinning Wheel - Rumpelstiltskin...
Loads of other stuff, see the Version History.

This version adds Covens. Players can search for witches in the world, and recruit up to six of them by performing the tasks they offer. A coven allows a player to perform more powerful circle magic using a Seer Stone. Details of all changes and fixes, as well as a download link, can be found in the Version History.

* Crystal Ball: Scry the area using your or another taglock kit, or predict your or another player's future.
* Wild Bramble: Bramble that causes damage, which spreads when broken.
* Blood Rose: A plant that collects taglocks when a player walks over it.
* Curse of Sinking: Don't go in the water when under this curse.
* Loads of other tweaks and bug fixes, see the Version History

This version adds curses and curse removal, an improved taglock dynamic, chests that take taglocks, a book on plants and a rite to cook things. It also adds a new mob, the Ent and a new creation method based on mutating items (currently just the aforementioned chest is made this way). Finally this version adds the Mystic Branch, which infused players can wave around to cause magical mischief. There are of course other tweaks and many fixes, please see the Version History for a complete list of changes and the download link.
This version adds cat, owl and toad familiars! Plus a ton of other stuff, see the version history.

entry.title: The Witchery website is up and running

div.span: ...although it is a bit light on content.

td.div: This version adds icy magic in the form of the Brew of Frost and icy slippers. It also adds a new mob, the horned huntsman, that may be summoned with the new Wicker Bundle block. This version fixes a number of bugs, see the version history for all changes and a download link.

So at last the mod is feature complete; it's time to test it. The alpha testers and myself are trying to complete a full play-through and get every single feature checked out. No small task! Hopefully it all goes smoothly and we can get on to an open beta sometime soon.

div.span: Here is a short video showing a rite to pull a demon into the world. It is very work-in-progress...
